narrative:
Wayne Township (precinct in Pickaway County) has 316 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.2 percentage points.
